home.title: Welcome to Our School
home.subtitle: A place where young minds grow with knowledge, discipline, and confidence.
home.card1Text: We are committed to delivering high-quality education and strong academic foundations.
home.card2Text: We nurture respectful, disciplined, and responsible students with strong moral values.
home.card3Text: We encourage creativity, leadership, teamwork, and personal growth in every student.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.text: Our vision is to build a generation of disciplined, knowledgeable, and responsible students who will contribute positively to society and face the future with confidence.
vision.missionText: To provide quality education, develop good values, and create a supportive environment where every student can grow academically, socially, and personally.
vision.valuesText: Discipline, respect, honesty, responsibility, leadership, and a commitment to excellence in all aspects of life.

staff.title: Our Staff
staff.subtitle: Meet the dedicated team guiding and supporting our students.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.address: Your School Address, Colombo, Sri Lanka

footer.schoolText: A place where students grow with knowledge, discipline, and values for a better future.
